columns.name: Prigruppe
columns.description: The priority group for the trekk

columns.name: PrioSekvens
columns.description: The sequence number within the priority group

columns.name: TrekkFraDato
columns.description: The date from which the trekk starts

columns.name: TrekkBelop
columns.description: Total amount of the trekk in kr.

columns.name: TrekkHittil
columns.description: The total amount paid so far, in kr.

columns.name: OppgjortDato
columns.description: The date when the trekk was settled

columns.name: ManOppgjortDato
columns.description: The manual settlement date if different from the actual settlement date

columns.name: Brukerid
columns.description: The identifier of the user who performed the action

columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the record was created or last updated

columns.name: FraOppgjbrevNr
columns.description: The number of the beginning oppegjorsbrev if applicable
